## Summary

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance
- [ ] Security or safety-sensitive change

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the documented local checks, or explained why they cannot run.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where behavior changed.
- [ ] I reviewed generated files and kept unrelated changes out of this PR.

## Compatibility and documentation

- [ ] I documented user-visible behavior, compatibility, migration, or release-note impact.
- [ ] This change has no compatibility impact, or I explained it below.

## Security and safety

- [ ] This PR contains no credentials, private data, production endpoints, or sensitive logs.
- [ ] I followed the repository's safety review requirements, if applicable.

## Related Issue

Closes #<ISSUE_NUMBER>
